ident_heading: Privacy Policy
heading_content_part: The meteoric growth of Android device sales over the past number of years coupled with the increased use of Android-based smartphones in the world means that Android is now a real competitor to Apple's iOS. Android app development is the first choice for many, especially since there are more Android devices in the world than iPhone. The Cast4TV's team of Android app developers has years of experience in building rock solid Android apps for phones and tablets.

ident_heading: Privacy Policy
heading_content_part: We offer native Android app development services to individuals and businesses looking to release their first app or upgrade an existing piece of software. We build our native apps from scratch using the latest design trends and technologies.Privacy PolicyCast4TV team has adopted this privacy policy ("Privacy Policy") to explain how Cast4TV collects, stores, and uses the information collected in connection with Cast4TV's Services.

ident_heading: Privacy Policy
heading_content_part: BY INSTALLING, USING, REGISTERING TO OR OTHERWISE ACCESSING THE SERVICES, YOU AGREE TO THIS PRIVACY POLICY AND GIVE AN EXPLICIT AND INFORMED CONSENT TO THE PROCESSING OF YOUR PERSONAL DATA IN ACCORDANCE WITH THIS PRIVACY POLICY. IF YOU DO NOT AGREE TO THIS PRIVACY POLICY, PLEASE DO NOT INSTALL, USE, REGISTER TO OR OTHERWISE ACCESS THE SERVICES. Cast4TV reserves the right to modify this Privacy Policy at reasonable times, so please review it frequently. If Cast4TV makes material or significant changes to this Privacy Policy, Cast4TV may post a notice on Cast4TV's website along with the updated Privacy Policy. Your continued use of Services will signify your acceptance of the changes to this Privacy Policy.

heading_content_part: For purposes of this Privacy Policy, "personal data" means personally identifiable information that specifically identifies you as an individual.				Personal information collected by Cast4TV is information voluntarily provided to us by you when you create your account or change your account information. The information includes your facebook id, name, gender, location and your friends'id on facebook. Cast4TV also stores your App checkins, likes, dislikes, recommendations and messages.

heading_content_part: Please note that certain features of the Services may be able to connect to your social networking sites to obtain additional information about you. In such cases, Cast4TV may be able to collect certain information from your social networking profile when your social networking site permits it, and when you consent to allow your social networking site to make that information available to Cast4TV. This information may include, but is not limited to, your name, profile picture, gender, user ID, email address, your country, your language, your time zone, the organizations and links on your profile page, the names and profile pictures of your social networking site "friends" and other information you have included in your social networking site profile. Cast4TV may associate and/or combine as well as use information collected by Cast4TV and/or obtained through such social networking sites in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

decoder_heading: Disclosure and Transfer of Personal Data
ident_heading: Disclosure and Transfer of Personal Data
heading_content_part: Disclosure and Transfer of Personal DataCast4TV collects and processes personal data on a voluntary basis and it is not in the business of selling your personal data to third parties. Personal data may, however, occasionally be disclosed in accordance with applicable legislation and this Privacy Policy. Additionally, Cast4TV may disclose personal data to its parent companies and its subsidiaries in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

decoder_heading: Disclosure and Transfer of Personal Data
ident_heading: Disclosure and Transfer of Personal Data
heading_content_part: Cast4TV may hire agents and contractors to collect and process personal data on Cast4TV's behalf and in such cases such agents and contractors will be instructed to comply with our Privacy Policy and to use personal data only for the purposes for which the third party has been engaged by Cast4TV. These agents and contractors may not use your personal data for their own marketing purposes. Cast4TV may use third party service providers such as credit card processors, e-mail service providers, shipping agents, data analyzers and business intelligence providers. Cast4TV has the right to share your personal data as necessary for the aforementioned third parties to provide their services for Cast4TV. Cast4TV is not liable for the acts and omissions of these third parties, except as provided by mandatory law.

decoder_heading: Disclosure and Transfer of Personal Data
ident_heading: Disclosure and Transfer of Personal Data
heading_content_part: Cast4TV may disclose your personal data to third parties as required by law enforcement or other government officials in connection with an investigation of fraud, intellectual property infringements, or other activity that is illegal or may expose you or Cast4TV to legal liability. Cast4TV may also disclose your personal data to third parties when Cast4TV has a reason to believe that a disclosure is necessary to address potential or actual injury or interference with Cast4TV's rights, property, operations, users or others who may be harmed or may suffer loss or damage, or Cast4TV believes that such disclosure is necessary to protect Cast4TV's rights, combat fraud and/or comply with a judicial proceeding, court order, or legal process served on Cast4TV. To the extent permitted by applicable law, Cast4TV will make reasonable efforts to notify you of such disclosure through Cast4TV's website or in another reasonable manner.

heading_content_part: Safeguards

decoder_heading: Disclosure and Transfer of Personal Data
ident_heading: Disclosure and Transfer of Personal Data
heading_content_part: Cast4TV follows generally accepted industry standards and maintains reasonable safeguards to attempt to ensure the security, integrity and privacy of the information in Cast4TV's possession. Only those persons with a need to process your personal data in connection with the fulfillment of their tasks in accordance with the purposes of this Privacy Policy and for the purposes of performing technical maintenance, have access to your personal data in Cast4TV's possession. Personal data collected by Cast4TV is stored in secure operating environments that are not available to the public. To prevent unauthorized on-line access to personal data, Cast4TV maintains personal data behind a firewall-protected server. However, no system can be 100% secure and there is the possibility that despite Cast4TV's reasonable efforts, there could be unauthorized access to your personal data. By using the Services, you assume this risk.

ident_heading: er open features of the Services
heading_content_part: If you are under 15 years of age or a minor in your country of residence, please ask your legal guardian's permission to use or access the Services. Cast4TV takes children's privacy seriously, and encourages parents and/or guardians to play an active role in their children's online experience at all times. Cast4TV does not knowingly collect any personal information from children below the aforementioned age and if Cast4TV learns that Cast4TV has inadvertently gathered personal data from children under the aforementioned age, Cast4TV will take reasonable measures to promptly erase such personal data from Cast4TV's records.

If Cast4TV receives a formal written complaint from you, it is Cast4TV's policy to attempt to contact you directly to address any of your concerns. Cast4TV will cooperate with the appropriate governmental authorities, including data protection authorities, to resolve any complaints regarding the collection, use, transfer or disclosure of personal data that cannot be amicably resolved between you and Cast4TV.
